The '''''Sunrider''''' was a small starship found by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Tionne Solusar]], [[Ikrit]], [[Anakin Solo]], [[Tahiri Veila]] and [[Uldir Lochett]] during their [[Mission to Bast Castle|trip]] to [[Bast Castle]] on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].

==History==
The ''Sunrider'' was of an unknown ancient class and thus was suitable for the [[Kushiban]] Ikrit who had been born centuries before its discovery. The ship, formerly owned by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], was named by Ikrit after [[Nomi Sunrider]]. This name was symbolic of Ikrit's choice to lay down his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], just as Nomi Sunrider gave up her weapon after slaying her [[Andur Sunrider|husband's]] murderers.

Later, Uldir—having believed that [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Mage]] [[Orloc]] would be able to awaken the Force powers within him, which nobody at the Jedi Praxeum on Yavin 4 had been able to do so—stole ''Sunrider'' along with two Jedi artifacts recovered during the previous adventure at Bast Castle. They were the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the [[Asli Krimsan's holocron|holocron]] of the ancient [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Asli Krimsan]]. Later, the ship was left behind as the group left [[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]] as they did not have the time to repair it after Orloc's henchmen had tampered with it. Ikrit stated that he might go back and retrieve the ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Vader's Fortress]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]''
